overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Max Buffer ETF - November (PMNV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one-year period. The exposure is reset annually in November PMNV was launched on Oct 31, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.
